section.title: Worksheets
section.p:
There will be seven exercise worksheets through the term, mostly corresponding to one per week. Additionally there are three exam preparation assignments, that are worth the same as the seven worksheets in your grade calculation. There are several purposes of these assignments:
Allow me to review your process for finding answers, so I can make sure that you do not have a fundamental misunderstanding.
Develop your ability to explain how to reach an answer, which is something that an online homework problem cannot do.
Ask questions that are too complex for to assess automatically.

paragraphs.title: Late Submissions
paragraphs.p: Worksheets have a due date in D2L. Completing them by the due date helps you stay on pace to be successful. They are due at 10:00 on Sunday evenings, just like assignments for the week. After that, you could still turn in a worksheet on person by the start of the next class meeting. After that, late submissions will not be accepted and the score will be zero. (Reach out to me if you had a medical or family emergency.)
